train.name: RANGE_TIGHT_UP
train.expr: (((TS_MAX($close,15) - TS_MIN($close,15)) / TS_MIN($close,15) < 0.05) & ($close > TS_MEAN($close,10))) ? RANK($close / TS_MEAN($close,10)) : nan

train.name: RANGE_BREAK_VOL
train.expr: ((((TS_MAX($close, 10) - TS_MIN($close, 10)) / TS_MIN($close, 10) < 0.02) & ($close > TS_MAX($close, 10)) & ((TS_MEAN($volume, 5) / TS_MEAN($volume, 20)) > 1.2))) ? RANK(($close - TS_MAX($close, 10)) / TS_MAX($close, 10)) : 0

train.name: FFLOW_VOL_QUIET_ENTRY
train.expr: ((TS_SUM($net_foreign_val, 5) > 0) & (TS_STD($return, 5) < TS_STD($return, 20)) & ($close > TS_MEAN($close, 20))) ? RANK(INV(1 + TS_STD($return, 10)) * TS_SUM($net_foreign_val, 5)) : nan

train.name: FFLOW_BB_SQUEEZE_BUY
train.expr: ((BB_UPPER($close, 20) - BB_LOWER($close, 20)) / ($close + 1e-8) < TS_MEAN((BB_UPPER($close, 20) - BB_LOWER($close, 20)) / ($close + 1e-8), 60)) & ($net_foreign_val > 0) ? RANK($net_foreign_val / (BB_UPPER($close, 20) - BB_LOWER($close, 20) + 1e-12)) : nan

test.name: BB_WIDTH_PCTILE_BREAK
test.expr: ((((BB_UPPER($close,20) - BB_LOWER($close,20)) / $close) < PERCENTILE(((BB_UPPER($close,20) - BB_LOWER($close,20)) / $close), 0.2)) & ($close > BB_UPPER($close,20))) ? RANK($close / BB_UPPER($close,20)) : nan

test.name: REL_AMOUNT_SHARE_GAIN
test.expr: (((TS_MEAN($amount,5) / TS_MEAN($amount,5)) > (TS_MEAN($amount,20) / TS_MEAN($amount,20))) & ($return > 0)) ? RANK((TS_MEAN($amount,5) / TS_MEAN($amount,5)) / (TS_MEAN($amount,20) / TS_MEAN($amount,20))) : nan
